## Diagram 2

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Client
    participant Lambda as lambda_handler
    participant Auth as auth
    participant CommentSvc as comment_service

    Client->>Lambda: HTTP PATCH /submission/{submission_id}/comment/{comment_id} (event)
    Lambda->>Lambda: get_path_parameter(event, "submission_id")
    Lambda->>Auth: auth.get_organization_id(event)
    Auth-->>Lambda: owner_id
    Lambda->>Lambda: get_event_body(event)
    Lambda->>Lambda: get_path_parameter(event, "comment_id")
    Lambda->>Lambda: deepcopy event -> event_comment
    Lambda->>Lambda: set event_comment.pathParameters and event_comment.body
    Lambda->>CommentSvc: invoke_lambda("comment_patch", full_payload=event_comment)
    CommentSvc-->>Lambda: response
    Lambda-->>Client: return response
```
